ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the building */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the building is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the building is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the building is located */,
  "building_type" TEXT /* Type of building (e.g., school, office, hospital) */,
  "num_floors" INTEGER /* Total number of floors in the building */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum occupancy capacity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "floors" (
  "floor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each floor */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building the floor belongs to */,
  "floor_number" INTEGER /* Floor number */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Square footage of the floor */,
  "floor_plan_url" TEXT /* URL to the floor plan image */,
  "max_occupancy" INTEGER /* Maximum occupancy for the floor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("floor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_floors_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "floor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the floor the room is on */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room (e.g., classroom, office, hallway) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of people the room can hold */,
  "has_exit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the room has a direct exit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rooms_floor_id FOREIGN KEY ("floor_id") REFERENCES floors ("floor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hallways" (
  "hallway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hallway */,
  "floor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the floor the hallway is on */,
  "hallway_name" TEXT /* Name of the hallway */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the hallway */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the hallway */,
  "connects_to" TEXT /* List of rooms or other hallways it connects to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hallway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hallways_floor_id FOREIGN KEY ("floor_id") REFERENCES floors ("floor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exits" (
  "exit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exit */,
  "floor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the floor the exit is on */,
  "exit_name" TEXT /* Name of the exit */,
  "exit_type" TEXT /* Type of exit (e.g., door, stairwell) */,
  "exit_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of people that can exit per minute */,
  "is_emergency_only" INTEGER /* Indicates if the exit is for emergency use only */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exits_floor_id FOREIGN KEY ("floor_id") REFERENCES floors ("floor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "obstacles" (
  "obstacle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each obstacle */,
  "floor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the floor the obstacle is on */,
  "obstacle_name" TEXT /* Name of the obstacle */,
  "obstacle_type" TEXT /* Type of obstacle (e.g., pillar, furniture) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the obstacle (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* Geometric coordinates of the obstacle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obstacle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_obstacles_floor_id FOREIGN KEY ("floor_id") REFERENCES floors ("floor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building the simulation was run on */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the simulation */,
  "casualties" INTEGER /* Number of casualties in the simulation */,
  "casualty_rate" REAL /* Casualty rate of the simulation */,
  "scenario_type" TEXT /* Type of scenario (e.g., fire, earthquake) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the simulation */,
  "evacuation_plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evacuation plan used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the result belongs to */,
  "exit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exit the students exited through */,
  "exit_time" TEXT /* Time at which the students exited */,
  "number_of_students" INTEGER /* Number of students who exited through the exit */,
  "average_exit_time" REAL /* Average time taken for individuals to exit */,
  "bottleneck_report" TEXT /* Summary of identified bottlenecks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_exit_id FOREIGN KEY ("exit_id") REFERENCES exits ("exit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, planner, responder) */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
